publishedAbstract: - When running the multus validation tool to verify the networking connectivity required for ODF/OCS deployment it fails with the error: ~~~ RESULT: multus validation test failed: multus validation test timed out: number of 'Ready' host checkers [0] is not the number expected [3] ~~~
publishedTitle: Multus Validation tool for ODF/OCS fails with "number of 'Ready' host checkers [0] is not the number expected [3]" on Red Hat Openshift Container Platform 4
